description: This file serves as the entry point for a React web application. It imports necessary modules, including React, ReactDOM, a CSS file for styling, and the main App component. It initializes the React DOM root and renders the App component within a StrictMode for highlighting potential issues during development.

methods.name: ReactDOM.createRoot
methods.description: Creates a root for rendering React components into the DOM.

methods.name: root.render
methods.description: Renders the React component tree into the DOM node.
